info.title: Restaurant App API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation synchronized with ApiHandler routes and DTO contracts.

423.description: User locked due to failed attempts

get.summary: Get valid slot start/end times for a location

parameters.name: from_time
parameters.description: Optional UTC ISO datetime. Must use Z/+00:00 and match the date parameter.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional booking date in YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to today (UTC).

parameters.name: from_time
parameters.description: UTC ISO datetime. Must be on the same date as 'date'.

parameters.name: to_time
parameters.description: UTC ISO datetime. Must be later than from_time and on the same date.

parameters.name: dietary_filter
parameters.description: Optional dietary filter matched against dish description tags.

get.summary: Get tables for a location (waiter only)
Get location feedbacks with pagination and sorting

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by date or rate using asc/desc, e.g. date,desc.

parameters.name: reportType
parameters.description: Report category. Accepts aliases like staff/staffperformance/location as well.

get.summary: Get waiter reservations for a table and time

ErrorBody.description: Backend can return either message objects, validation arrays, or generic objects.

password.description: 8-16 chars, includes uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special char

UpdateReservationRequest.description: At least one of guestsNumber or status must be present.

type.description: cuisine is accepted and normalized to culinary.
cuisine is accepted and normalized to culinary.

items.description: Row structure varies by reportType (staff_performance or sales).
